arts.ttl: 'Worst in league' - Pep Guardiola delivers brutal Man City home truths before Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola had a number of things to get off his chest ahead of Manchester City's Premier League visit of Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'set' Christopher Nkunku transfer price as Potter rejects chance to help
arts.sum: Firstly, that Chelsea do not want to sell Nkunku and secondly, they sense that United are desperate to get a deal done. Ahead of another busy weekend, football.london has taken a closer look at some of the current headlines circulating around the club.

arts.ttl: 'I was forced to join Chelsea and cried on drive there – I didn't want to leave Man City'
arts.sum: Shaun Wright-Phillips was one of Jose Mourinho's earliest signings at Chelsea but never wanted to join the Blues. He even broke down in tears after his transfer from Manchester City was confirmed

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Manchester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea visit Manchester City at the Etihad with questions about Enzo Fernandez and Levi Colwill's availability.

arts.ttl: Man City and Erling Haaland have done what Chelsea wanted to do amid £1bn spending spree
arts.sum: Manchester City have tied Erling Haaland down to a lengthy contract, something Chelsea did with mixed results to several of their squad

arts.ttl: Man City vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Man City vs Chelsea in the Premier League, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: Manchester City have been asleep at the wheel for too long and the £130million spending spree shows a club in panic mode
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: The more I see of Manchester City, the more I am surprised their powers-that-be didn't see this coming. They've been caught asleep at the wheel.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca admits Robert Sanchez is 'far' from the level Chelsea need him to be - as he tells his under-fire No 1 to deal with fan criticism
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has told Robert Sanchez that he needs to 'manage' fan criticism and that his goalkeeper is far from the level that he wants him to be at.

arts.ttl: Everton consider sending injured loan star Armando Broja back to Chelsea - in exchange for a midfielder
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: Broja was injured during the FA Cup third round defeat of Peterborough and his ankle issue is likely to mean he is sidelined for three months.

arts.ttl: Man United considering shock move for £70m Chelsea star amid Alejandro Garnacho uncertainty
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly considering a shock swoop for Chelsea attacker Christopher Nkunku amid uncertainty surrounding Alejandro Garnacho's future.
